data.title: Behind the Scenes of Broadcom's Latest Options Trends
What's Going On With Walgreens Stock Friday?
data.description: Walgreens shares are moving higher on Friday after the company entered an agreement to be acquired by private-equity firm Sycamore Partners.

data.title: Is Surf Air Mobility Flying Under The Investor Radar? Analyst Weighs In
data.description: H.C. Wainwright analyst initiates coverage on Surf Air Mobility Inc. with a Buy rating and $12 price target, citing potential turnaround and unique approach to electric aviation. Fourth-quarter results to be announced on March 18, 2025.

data.title: Bessent Describes Economic 'Detox Period' As US Shifts To Trump Policies
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent acknowledged signs of economic weakness in the United States. Bessent said on CNBC's Squawk Box that the economy was "addicted" to public spending and needed a "detox period."
